text.p: How are you and your studies in the other sea? I hope you are fine. they just finish national population and housing census in Nigeria , that was last mon-th , it was succesful and peaceful. I
The census has made it possible for the Government to 1 word know the nuber number of those how who are tobles in Nigeria, and the Government is seriously tackling the situation of unemployment.

The programme has realy help the life of so many Nigerias. In such a way that the family pl-anning programme is also seriously on, so that they can advise parent on child barth control for the benefit of our economy in Nigeria.

This programm also made the Nigeria Government to know the number of farmers in Nigeria and they were able to provide them with farm equipment and fertilizer so that there will be enough food for consuption and for exporting.
Nigeria has realy benefits from this year national population and housing census also the citizenry. I would like to stop here.
